task_completion.description: Verify the document page size is set to Legal (8.5" x 14").
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Page Style/Properties dialog showing 'Legal' or dimensions 8.5" x 14", or check the horizontal and vertical rulers in the word processor interface indicating an 8.5-inch width and 14-inch height.

task_completion.description: Verify a right-aligned header is added with the text 'DRAFT ORDINANCE - NOT ADOPTED'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top margin (header area) of the document. The text 'DRAFT ORDINANCE - NOT ADOPTED' should be visible and aligned to the right edge of the page.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Heading 1' is applied to the main title and 'Heading 2' to the six main section headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for visual distinction (larger font size, bold weight) for 'ARTICLE X: TRANSIT-ORIENTED DEVELOPMENT (TOD) DISTRICT' and the section headers. The formatting toolbar or styles pane should indicate 'Heading 1' or 'Heading 2' when these are selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the specified defined terms in Section 3 are bolded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Section 3, the terms 'Transit Station Area', 'Active Floor Area', 'Pedestrian-Oriented Facade', and 'Shared Parking' must appear in a bold font weight compared to the surrounding regular text.

task_completion.description: Verify the permitted uses list in Section 4 is converted into a 4-column table with specific headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a visible table structure in Section 4 with exactly 4 columns. The top row of the table must contain the headers: 'Use Category', 'Specific Use', 'Status', and 'Standards'.

task_completion.description: Verify the final document is saved as 'tod_ordinance_draft.docx'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the word processor window to see 'tod_ordinance_draft.docx', or look for a file manager/terminal window showing this new file in the ~/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a graphical word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreOffice Writer (or similar word processor) GUI open with the document loaded, rather than just terminal commands executing a python script to modify the docx.

integrity.description: Ensure the table in Section 4 is a real word processor table.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for table gridlines, table borders, or the table formatting toolbar appearing in the UI, proving it is not just text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: Ensure the header text is placed in the actual document header, not the body.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a demarcation line separating the header area from the main body text, or the header text appearing grayed out when the body is active (standard word processor behavior for headers).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/tod_ordinance_draft.docx. The document must be Legal size (8.5x14.0 inches). The header must contain 'DRAFT ORDINANCE - NOT ADOPTED' right-aligned. The terms to be bolded in Section 3 are: 'Transit Station Area', 'Active Floor Area', 'Pedestrian-Oriented Facade', and 'Shared Parking'. The table in Section 4 must have exactly 4 columns with headers: 'Use Category', 'Specific Use', 'Status', and 'Standards'.
